description: A simple greeting script to practice the Ralph workflow

userStories.title: Create basic greeting function
userStories.description: Create a JavaScript file with a function that returns 'Hello, World!'
userStories.notes: Keep it simple - just a basic function

userStories.title: Add personalized greeting
userStories.description: Modify greet() to accept a name parameter
acceptanceCriteria: greet() returns 'Hello, World!' when no name given
Running 'node src/greet.js Ivan' prints personalized greeting
userStories.notes: Use process.argv to get command line argument

userStories.title: Add multiple greeting styles
userStories.description: Add formal and casual greeting options
acceptanceCriteria: greet(name, 'formal') returns 'Good day, [name]. How may I assist you?'
userStories.notes: Second command line argument for style
